mapper.select: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.LectureLikeMapper.selectByPk */ select a.* from t_lecture_like a where a.edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and a.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.LectureLikeMapper.deleteByPk */ delete from t_lecture_like where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and user_id = #{userId}
